title: Eilistraee
bodyText:
Chaotic-good drow goddess — **daughter of Lolth** — whose whole purpose is freeing the drow from their mother's webbed underground prison: bring them topside, smell the flowers, dance in the moonlight. 9ft glossy-skinned drow, ankle-length silver hair, silver radiance. Goddess of swordwork and song. A solitary dance in her honor may turn your hair radiant silver. Art: art/eilistraee.jpg, art/eilistraee-projection.jpg

# Current truth (grill 2026-07-09)
- **She is caged in the Pool** — trapped by her mother **Lolth** ([[the-pool]], [[thread-orb]]). She is one of the "caged lady" signals reaching the party.
- **Powered by reflected sunlight:** she is a moon goddess and goes dark when no sun shines on the moon. With **Lathander** caged, the sun is gone — so she is nearly powerless. **Freeing Lathander restores her** (sun → moon). Her freedom is *downstream* of his (see [[arc-chapter-1]]).
- **The mark is HERS.** Eilistraee marks her chosen with **visions to defy Lolth and flee topside** (moonlight, dancing, a path out). It is **not fatal** — **Lolth hunts and kills the marked** ([[the-eight-legs]], [[the-assassin]]). That's why Varen's research finds only dead bearers ("King John had this... and died") — Lolth reached them, not the mark. **Kena amputated** to drop off the web.

> [!dm] Resolves the old ambiguity: the mark is a blessing/summons, Lolth is the killer. **[[thread-orb]] is now closed — the orb and voice are HER**, not Leliana. "Bring him back" = get **Lathander** freed: his return is her own salvation (sun → moon). She's steering Varen to help Eddy free the god.
